Class NetBeansModuleUtils

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.module.NetBeansModuleUtils
public final class NetBeansModuleUtils extends Object
Utility class for introspecting NetBeans modules and their classpaths.
Author:
anahata

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private static String
    cachedNetBeansClasspath
    Cached classpath string for the NetBeans environment.
    private static final Logger
    logger
    Logger instance for module utility operations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    private
    NetBeansModuleUtils()
    Private constructor to prevent instantiation of this utility class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static String
    buildFullModuleClasspath()
    Internal logic to construct the NetBeans classpath by aggregating the system classpath, dynamic classpath, and all reachable module JARs.
    private static String
    filesToClassPathString(Set<File> classPath)
    Converts a set of File objects into a single classpath string using the platform's path separator.
    static List<File>
    getAllModuleJarsUsingReflection(org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo thisModule)
    Uses reflection to invoke the non-public getAllJars() method on a ModuleInfo instance.
    private static Set<File>
    getClassPath(org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo mi, Set<org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo> processed)
    Recursively traverses the dependency tree of a module to collect all associated JAR files.
    private static org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo
    getDependantModuleInfo(org.openide.modules.Dependency d)
    Resolves a dependency to its corresponding ModuleInfo.
    static String
    getFullModuleClasspath()
    Gets the comprehensive classpath for the NetBeans environment.
    private static Set<File>
    getModuleClassPath()
    Retrieves the set of JAR files that constitute the classpath of the current Anahata module and all its dependencies.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • logger

      private static final Logger logger
      Logger instance for module utility operations.

    • cachedNetBeansClasspath

      private static String cachedNetBeansClasspath
      Cached classpath string for the NetBeans environment.

  • Constructor Details

    • NetBeansModuleUtils

      private NetBeansModuleUtils()
      Private constructor to prevent instantiation of this utility class.

  • Method Details

    • getFullModuleClasspath

      public static String getFullModuleClasspath()
      Gets the comprehensive classpath for the NetBeans environment. The result is cached after the first call.
      Returns:
      The full NetBeans classpath string.

    • buildFullModuleClasspath

      private static String buildFullModuleClasspath()
      Internal logic to construct the NetBeans classpath by aggregating the system classpath, dynamic classpath, and all reachable module JARs.
      Returns:
      The fully assembled classpath string.

    • getModuleClassPath

      private static Set<File> getModuleClassPath()
      Retrieves the set of JAR files that constitute the classpath of the current Anahata module and all its dependencies.
      Returns:
      A Set of File objects representing the module classpath.

    • getClassPath

      private static Set<File> getClassPath(org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo mi, Set<org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo> processed)
      Recursively traverses the dependency tree of a module to collect all associated JAR files.
      Parameters:
      mi - The module to start traversal from.
      processed - The set of already processed modules to prevent cycles.
      Returns:
      A Set of JAR files for the module and its transitive dependencies.

    • getDependantModuleInfo

      private static org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo getDependantModuleInfo(org.openide.modules.Dependency d)
      Resolves a dependency to its corresponding ModuleInfo.
      Parameters:
      d - The dependency to resolve.
      Returns:
      The ModuleInfo if it's a module dependency and can be found, null otherwise.

    • getAllModuleJarsUsingReflection

      public static List<File> getAllModuleJarsUsingReflection(org.openide.modules.ModuleInfo thisModule)
      Uses reflection to invoke the non-public getAllJars() method on a ModuleInfo instance. This is necessary to get the full list of JARs bundled with a module (including library extensions).
      Parameters:
      thisModule - The module to inspect.
      Returns:
      A list of JAR files provided by the module.

    • filesToClassPathString

      private static String filesToClassPathString(Set<File> classPath)
      Converts a set of File objects into a single classpath string using the platform's path separator.
      Parameters:
      classPath - The set of files to process.
      Returns:
      A formatted classpath string.
